title: CookiEmojis
description: CookiEmojis lets you upload custom emojis, which will be rendered in-game and are visible to anyone using the mod
body:
# CookiEmojis
**Create custom in-game emojis to Minecraft.**
The mod is completly client-side and free


![Emoji](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/593199d2090185ac0122984602542a3c48d4c333_0.webp)

## What is CookiEmojis
CookiEmojis is a client-side mod which adds a new custom emoji functionality. You can upload your own emojis and use ones uploaded by others. Everyone, who is using CookiEmojis will see emojis. Since the mod is client-side only, it works on every server.

## Uploading Emojis
Upload your own Emojis [here](https://cookieattack.de/cookiemojis)
- Uploads are currently limited to once per day.
